content:
Adhesion testing performed on coupon-level specimens (cell/encapsulant/glass laminates) showed decreases in adhesion energy, Gc , from 5000 ... [REF:6].

Samples with gel content below 70% show low chemical and optical stability, weak adhesion strength, and EVA flowing. [REF:5].

**Key Findings**

- Adhesion testing performed on coupon-level specimens (cell/encapsulant/glass laminates) showed decreases in adhesion energy, Gc , from 5000 ... [REF:6]
- Samples with gel content below 70% show low chemical and optical stability, weak adhesion strength, and EVA flowing. [REF:5]
